name: INDEPENDENT BANK CORP /MI/
business: Independent Bank Corporation is a bank holding company that owns all outstanding stock of Independent Bank, which offers a broad range of banking services to individuals and businesses in Lower Michigan. The company's principal sources of revenue are interest and fees on loans, other interest income, and non-interest income. It competes with other commercial banks, savings banks, credit unions, mortgage banking companies, fintech companies, and other financial institutions.
sellsTo: Rural and suburban communities across Lower Michigan

exposures.sentence: We also compete with fintech companies, securities brokerage companies, insurance companies, and money market mutual funds.
We face cybersecurity risks, including attacks targeting our systems and customers' systems.
Our use of artificial intelligence and machine learning technologies may expose us to regulatory, operational, and competitive risks.
Emerging digital assets and technologies may disrupt our business and adversely affect our results.
